feed.title: Jacky Bourgeois
feed.subtitle: I develop technological tools to support the use of machine data by designers. I am an assistant professor of Data-Centric Design with the Department of Sustainable Design Engineering (SDE) of the Faculty of Industrial Design Engineering (IDE).

entry.title: 🎓 Breaking the Innovational Standstill in Dutch Primary Education: Motivating teachers to learn and apply new educational methods

link.title: 🎓 Breaking the Innovational Standstill in Dutch Primary Education: Motivating teachers to learn and apply new educational methods

author.name: Stijn Smook (Chair: **Jacky Bourgeois**, Mentor: Catelijne van Middlekoop)

entry.summary: Dutch primary school teachers are strapped for time currently, and this is impeding the adoption of innovation. This is also a problem for Faqta, who are trying to sell their innovative teaching method. To convince teachers to learn, several theories and strategies are explored in this report, and how they can be applied on a digital video learning platform, the Faqta Academy, to answer the q...

entry.title: 🚩 [Open] Prototyping an Open Source Connected E-Bike for Remote Study

link.title: 🚩 [Open] Prototyping an Open Source Connected E-Bike for Remote Study

entry.summary: Context Biking is a dynamic and experiential process, and while we, as designers, would love to be next to our users to experience what they do, it’s tough while on the move. However, recent advances in IoT, sensors and other technologies could enable designers to “ride-along” with their users at a distance and thus foster insights and empathy. To do this, we want to develop a prototype e-bike...

entry.title: 🎓 FairData: A system to explore datasets as a tool to let data-centric researchers become aware of bias

link.title: 🎓 FairData: A system to explore datasets as a tool to let data-centric researchers become aware of bias

author.name: Tomas Heinsohn Huala (Chair: Alessandro Bozzon, Mentor: **Jacky Bourgeois**, External: Ujwal Gadiraju)

entry.summary: Data-centric research is all about trying to obtain useful insights on products that its researchers trying to create/design by collecting usage data on their prototypes. This type of research, usually performed by data-scientist, make use of machine learning techniques in order to improve any system or product that makes use of automated decisions. Now that other researchers, in this case rese...

entry.title: 📅 Up Close and Personal '21
entry.summary: This year I had the honour to help out the curation and organisation of Up Close and Personal – a Design United contribution to the Dutch Design Week. For the 2021 edition, we will talk about Entangled Ecologies, Connected Interactions, Changin Things, Embedded Designers and Evolving Methodologies. Come visit us at the Klokgebouw in Eindhoven and watch the talkshows on the website!

entry.title: 🎓 Design for information flow between data scientists and researchers in Ford

link.title: 🎓 Design for information flow between data scientists and researchers in Ford

author.name: Yen-Heng Chang (Chair: **Jacky Bourgeois**, Mentor: Nazli Cila)

entry.summary: As more and more data has been generated in the automotive industry in recent years, demand for data analyzing tasks increases among the research and development teams. It thus becomes an inevitable phenomenon that information and knowledge exchange between data scientists and domain experts becomes more frequent. The information flow influences the performance of the team and the outcome of th...
